dis_application_view.llm_summary: Faisal Malik is a PK national applying for Skilled Worker permission sponsored by Rinasha Properties Limited for Business and financial project management professionals (SOC 2440). The application states salary £61,500 against the SOC going rate £56,500 and start date 2026-07-01. The corpus evidence supports approval: identity, sponsorship, English language, maintenance, TB where required, criminality, and immigration compliance checks are all satisfactory.
